title: Germany - Tourist/Visit Visa

details.title: Eligibility
items: Valid passport with sufficient validity.
Clear purpose of travel to Germany or Schengen area.
Proof of financial capability for the trip.
Travel medical insurance covering Schengen countries.
Confirmed travel itinerary including flight and accommodation.
Proof of employment, business, or student status.

details.title: Required Documents
items: Completely filled and signed Schengen visa application form (use VIDEX website and print all pages including barcodes).
Declaration of Consent form.
Passport with minimum 3 months validity beyond visa expiry and at least 2 blank pages (previous passports if applicable).
One recent biometric passport sized photograph (35x45 mm, white background, 70–80% face coverage; do not glue or staple).
Overseas medical insurance valid for entire Schengen stay with minimum €30,000 coverage including repatriation (credit card insurance not accepted).
Flight reservation/itinerary and confirmed hotel booking with full address and reference number.
Personal covering letter explaining the purpose of the visit and who will bear the travel expenses.
Tour plan outlining the full intended itinerary and activities within the Schengen area.

Employment documents: Employer letter with designation, salary, leave approval and purpose of visit. For self-employed: Trade license, Certificate of Incorporation, Memorandum of Articles, and company bank statements (last 6 months). For students: Proof of enrolment and leave certificate.
Original personal bank statements for at least the last 6 months and proof of other financial assets (DPS, FDR, holding tax receipt, etc.).
Copy of personal tax return certificate with annual tax payment confirmation and proof of payment (latest fiscal year).
Civil status documents such as Marriage Certificate/Nikah Nama, Divorce Certificate, Death Certificate, or Children’s Birth Certificate translated into German or English.
Additional photocopies including passport biodata page, Bangladesh residence permit (if applicable), and copies of previous Schengen/US/Canada/UK visas.
For minors under 18: Birth certificate, custody/adoption documents if applicable, and notarized consent letter from legal guardian with passport copy if guardian is not traveling.

note: All expenditures related to visa processing are strictly non-refundable. Visa information and associated charges are subject to change at any time without prior notice. We provide assistance only and do not guarantee the issuance of visas. This information sheet has been prepared by us and may include additional details beyond the embassy's requirements.
